findings.title: Potential acceptance-criteria mismatch for blob_write_succeeded on idempotent runs
findings.resolution: Emitted blob_write_succeeded for duplicate/idempotent writes with write_status=already_exists while retaining blob_write_skipped_exists.

findings.title: Test gap for trapi_response_received required fields
findings.resolution: Extended success-path test assertions to verify player_count and latency_ms in trapi_response_received event.

findings.title: Defensive parsing for token_count
findings.resolution: Added safe integer coercion with fallback to 0 and added a unit test for malformed usage.total_tokens.
